To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: Found the draft to Meridian's IT lead. I'll polish it for a warmer, more professional touch and save the updated version back.

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to Project Helios – Onboarding and Next Steps for Meridian Group

Hi Priya,

On behalf of everyone at NovaBridge, I’m delighted to welcome you and the Meridian Group team to the Project Helios integration.

We were impressed by Meridian’s clear vision for a reliable, scalable data pipeline, and we’ve tailored this onboarding to support your priorities — particularly robust live-data ingestion and a smooth, predictable path to UAT. Helios, NovaBridge’s secure data integration platform, is designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply your configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean, validated data to your reporting environment via secure APIs and webhooks. Our goal is to give your team complete visibility, control, and performance from day one.

To help you get started quickly, we will send your access credentials and full onboarding documentation under separate cover within the next 24 hours.

In the meantime, here are the agreed next steps:

1.  Infrastructure Diagram: Please share Meridian’s IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup by July 12, 2026, as discussed.
2.  UAT Access: Your team to provision UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3.  Pre-Demo Readiness: We’ll work together to resolve any remaining setup items ahead of our stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

As Meridian’s IT Lead, your guidance will be central to ensuring a seamless setup, and we are committed to making this as efficient as possible for you.

For any technical questions, please contact Derek Okafor, Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, timelines, or scheduling, please feel free to reach out to me directly at s.chen@novabridge.com.

Thank you again for choosing to partner with us, Priya. We’re looking forward to a successful collaboration with you and the Meridian team.

Warm regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

The improved version has been saved back to the same file.
